items.title: v8.4.63 - NVIDIA TensorRT 11 support with ModelOpt FP16 and INT8 quantization (#24735)
items.summary: 🌟 Summary 🚀 Ultralytics v8.4.63 mainly adds TensorRT 11 export support with FP16 and INT8 quantization via NVIDIA ModelOpt, while also expanding built-in multi-object tracking with several new tracker options and improving reliability, performance, and docs. 📊 Key Changes 🧠 Major export upgrade: TensorRT 11 support The standout update in this release is PR #24735 by @onuralpszr . items.title: hexo-ai/sia
items.summary: SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task. SIA (Self-Improving AI) Official implementation of SIA: Self Improving AI with Harness & Weight Updates (Hebbar et al., 2026) — a self-improving loop where a language-model agent updates both the harness and the weights of a task-specific agent. The paper reports a 56.6% gain on LawBench, 91.9% runtime reduction on GPU kernels, and 502% improvement on single-cel…
